text:
There was a girl named Clara. She had an odd passion for collecting stones. Whenever she'd walk outside at night, she would just hunt for stones. She liked them. She always carried one or more in her bag. One day, she saw something she'd never seen before—a tiny, shimmering stone.

Curious, she took it home. She studied it and realized it was antique. She researched it and learned it was a magic gem, said to possess memories from many lifetimes. She kept it, loving its mystery.

Every day was an adventure discovering new, strange stories connected to the gem. She imagined what a thousand lives had passed through it. One day, while meditating with it, she fell into a deep trance.

When she woke up, she heard singing in her dreams. It was a voice telling her how much she loved collecting things. She found that love and collecting had become intertwined. She didn’t just want stones anymore; she had stories, personalities.
